en: Do your drivers only deliver to a warehouse or administrative offices at a Client Site?
Does your company transport over-sized/permit-required loads?
Do your Drivers load or offload material or operate equipment to load or offload at any Client site? (i.e., de-attaching straps or any mobile equipment such as cranes or forklifts.)
Do your drivers transport and offload hazardous and potentially hazardous materials that would require an SDS (Safety Data Sheet)?
